paper_info.title: Directing CO2 electroreduction pathways for selective C2 product formation using single-site doped copper catalysts
paper_info.authors: Zhengyuan Li, Peng Wang, Xiang Lyu, et al.

reaction_steps.site_structure: Cu(100) 表面（具体涉及Cu位点，M-Cu催化剂中M = Rh, Ir, Ru, Pd, Ag, Au）
reaction_steps.notes: 文献提及C-C耦合前的*CO生成是RDS

reaction_steps.adsorption_energy: CO的吸附能数据未在正文中以表格形式给出，但提及增强CO吸附有利于C-C耦合

reaction_steps.site_structure: Cu(100) 表面，M-Cu催化剂（M为单原子掺杂位点）
reaction_steps.activation_barrier: 未明确给出（仅提及这是RDS）
reaction_steps.notes: C–C coupling, which is regarded as the rate-determining step (RDS)

reaction_steps.step_name_zh: COCOH逐步质子-电子转移生成*CH₂CHO
reaction_steps.reaction_equation: *COCOH → [中间体1] → [中间体2] → [中间体3] → *CH₂CHO（经过四次PCET步骤）
reaction_steps.site_structure: Cu(100) 及 M-Cu 表面（Rh-Cu, Ir-Cu, Ru-Cu, Pd-Cu, Ag-Cu, Au-Cu）
reaction_steps.coordination_number: 对于oxophilic M-Cu（Rh, Ir, Ru），*CH₂CHO吸附在Cu₃M位点；对于oxophobic M-Cu（Pd, Ag, Au），倾向于在纯Cu位点吸附
reaction_steps.reaction_energy: 未明确给出各分步的自由能数据
reaction_steps.adsorption_energy: *CH₂CHO相对Cu的吸附能：Ru-Cu: -0.71 eV, Rh-Cu: -0.57 eV, Ir-Cu: -0.57 eV, Cu: 0 eV（基准）, Pd-Cu: +0.03 eV, Ag-Cu: +0.05 eV, Au-Cu: +0.06 eV

reaction_steps.site_structure: Cu(100) 及 M-Cu 表面，*O吸附在Cu₃M位点（oxophilic）或Cu₄位点（oxophobic）
reaction_steps.coordination_number: *O在Cu₄位点（纯Cu hollow site）或Cu₃M位点（掺杂原子参与）
reaction_steps.reaction_energy: 自由能变化：Ru-Cu: -0.78 eV, Rh-Cu: 未明确给出, Ir-Cu: -0.72 eV, Cu: -0.60 eV
reaction_steps.activation_barrier: C-O键断裂能垒：Ru-Cu: 0.61 eV, Rh-Cu: 0.41 eV, Ir-Cu: 0.42 eV, Cu: 0.53 eV
reaction_steps.adsorption_energy: *O相对Cu的吸附能：Ru-Cu: -0.66 eV, Rh-Cu: 未明确给出, Ir-Cu: -0.28 eV, Cu: 0 eV（基准）, Pd-Cu: +0.03 eV, Ag-Cu: +0.05 eV, Au-Cu: +0.06 eV

reaction_steps.reaction_equation: *CH₂CHO + H⁺ + e⁻ → *CH₃CHO（乙醛中间体，C-O键保留）
reaction_steps.site_structure: Cu(100) 及 M-Cu 表面，*CH₃CHO仍通过O原子吸附（Cu-O-C结构）
reaction_steps.reaction_energy: 自由能变化：Ru-Cu: -0.52 eV, Rh-Cu: -0.62 eV, Ir-Cu: -0.58 eV, Cu: -0.52 eV

reaction_steps.activation_barrier: *O质子化能垒：Ru-Cu: 0.50 eV, Rh-Cu: 0.44 eV, Ir-Cu: 0.38 eV, Cu: 0.31 eV
reaction_steps.adsorption_energy: 未明确给出*OH的单独吸附能
reaction_steps.notes: Rh dopant possesses an optimal oxygen affinity, balancing the activation energy barriers of C–O bond cleavage and *O protonation

key_findings.main_descriptor: 氧结合能 (Oxygen Binding Strength) 是控制C₂产物选择性的通用描述符
key_findings.optimal_conditions: -0.66 V vs RHE, 1 M KOH, flow cell

methodology.dft_details: VASP 5.4.4, PBE functional, PAW method, DFT-D3 correction, Cu(100) surface with 2×2 unit cell, 4-layer model
methodology.experimental_conditions: Flow cell with 1 M KOH electrolyte, catholyte flow rate 2 ml/min, CO₂ flow rate 50 sccm, Ag/AgCl reference electrode

raw_summary: 本论文报道了一种通过单原子掺杂调控Cu表面氧亲和力来控制CO₂电催化还原产物选择性的策略。研究发现氧结合能是决定C₂产物（乙烯vs乙醇）选择性的通用描述符。强氧亲和力催化剂（Rh, Ir, Ru掺杂）促进C-O键断裂，有利于生成乙烯；弱氧亲和力催化剂（Au掺杂）保留C-O键，有利于生成乙醇。Rh-Cu具有最优的氧亲和力，在C-O键断裂和*O质子化之间取得最佳平衡，实现了61.2%的乙烯法拉第效率和4.51的乙烯/乙醇选择性比率。结合ZnO/Rh-Cu串联电极，全电池乙烯法拉第效率达到68.8%，电流密度超过1 A/cm²。
